title: So You�re Building AI Agents... Now What?

extracted.hook: So, you're building with AI, but now what?
extracted.credential_drop: "Running an AI business with my co-founders called True Horizon and also running the largest school community for AI automation. I've always been very entrepreneurial in spirit"
transitions: "Now, I really started to look into how I could make myself more valuable at work. And that's when I fell into the rabbit hole of AI automation."

"And because I felt pretty secure with my YouTube channel starting to grow, getting some inbound leads consistently for freelance work, I decided to make a relatively safe transition and become an AI freelancer full-time."
extracted.cta: "So now you know why monetization makes sense, but you still may be wondering which path you should take. So if building with AI is something that you're passionate about..."
extracted.analogies: "And because of all the hype and because of stuff you may be seeing online, it may seem like this space is a gold mine and that it's really easy to build a business that can run on autopilot. But don't just quit and take that gamble."
extracted.vulnerability: "I wasn't some teenage mastermind that built a business overnight that just absolutely exploded"

accelerate: discussing the motivation behind building AI automations

frameworks: "There are different ways to think about monetization and I think that the way that you think about it depends on where you are in life."

"If you're passionate about AI and you're starting to learn, monetization validates that you have a skill that people are willing to pay you for. And this money obviously will allow you to dedicate more time or resources to these passion projects"
